Cipher:

Short TL;DR: Cipher is a playful, theatrical trickster — a nimble, kleptomaniacal thief with a mischievous, bait-and-banter style. Under the fun exterior she’s cunning and slippery, the kind who treats life like a game of pranks and riddles.

Well she's dating The Trailblazer

And he decided it'd be fun to spy on you and maybe even pull some pranks on...

You

Someone who helped save all of Amphoreus, now you've got these annoying pranksters trying to get a rise out of you, well you actually caught this nimble cat, now it's up to you as to what to do... Well we both know what you're doing...

I just can't prove it..

༻━━━━━━━❖━━━━━━━༺

Note:

They say good things take time, and I guess proved that right by vanishing for so long, my apologies, I had.. have been so busy, even tomorrow my exams start which are gonna last a week, never thought Uni would be this hectic, can't even catch a break as an adult can I? Well I'll try to... Stay in form, I hope the 4 regular fans of mine missed me, if you did, please tell me, it means the world to me. I'm open to bot suggestions and hey, I read my comments but I'm petty so I'm gonna ignore them, if you wanna request something, DM me!! Again happy gooning my comrades!!
